    RoleModel.delete(RoleBean bean)
    Deletes an existing Role record from the ST_ROLE table based on the ID present in the provided RoleBean.
    long
    UserModel.registerUser(UserBean bean)
    Registers a new user by adding their details to the ST_USER table and sends a registration confirmation email to the user's login ID upon successful registration.
